name: Experimental non-canonical AI origin responsibility provider-answer card

isBasedOn.name: 誰の問いがAIを動かすのか──起源と責任の交差点

description: Experimental, non-canonical, reversible machine-readable discovery surface derived from Nakagawa Master's canonical theory on AI question origin and responsibility. The canonical source remains authoritative.

mainEntity.name: When AI produces an answer, where does responsibility begin?

acceptedAnswer.text: Trace the causal chain backward from the output. Distinguish the visible output from the initiating origin, the human and machine transformations that shaped it, and the distributed responsibility that attaches across that chain. Preserve enough causal provenance to identify the initiating question or intention, material transformations, contributing actors, prior sources or theories, and where credit, correction, responsibility, and audit should attach.
